mapper.sql: c.cargo_id AS cargoId, c.owner_id AS ownerId, c.cargo_type AS cargoType, c.pet_name AS petName, c.pet_breed AS petBreed, c.pet_age AS petAge, c.pet_gender AS petGender, c.weight, c.status, c.origin_name AS originName, c.origin_lat AS originLat, c.origin_lng AS originLng, c.destination_name AS destinationName, c.destination_lat AS destinationLat, c.destination_lng AS destinationLng, c.contact_name AS contactName, c.contact_phone AS contactPhone, c.receiver_name AS receiverName, c.receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, c.request_note AS requestNote, c.loaded_at AS loadedAt, c.delivered_at AS deliveredAt, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, v.id AS vehicleId, v.plate AS vehiclePlate, v.driver_name AS driverName, v.driver_phone AS driverPhone
FROM cargo c LEFT JOIN cargo_vehicle_binding b ON b.cargo_id = c.cargo_id AND b.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN vehicles v ON v.id = b.vehicle_id

where.if: AND ( c.cargo_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.cargo_type ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.origin_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.destination_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR v.plate ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM cargo_vehicle_binding WHERE cargo_id = #{cargoId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cargo_status_logs ( id, cargo_id, status, lat, lng, remark, operator_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{cargoId}, #{status}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{remark}, #{operatorId}, now() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, cargo_id AS cargoId, vehicle_id AS vehicleId, status, bound_at AS boundAt, unbound_at AS unboundAt FROM cargo_vehicle_binding WHERE cargo_id = #{cargoId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
SELECT id, cargo_id as cargoId, status, lat, lng, remark, operator_id as operatorId, created_at as createdAt FROM cargo_status_logs WHERE cargo_id = #{cargoId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT cargo_id as cargoId FROM cargo_vehicle_binding WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY bound_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cargo ( cargo_id, owner_id, cargo_type, pet_name, pet_breed, pet_age, pet_gender, weight, status, origin_name, origin_lat, origin_lng, destination_name, destination_lat, destination_lng, contact_name, contact_phone, receiver_name, receiver_phone, request_note, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{cargoId}, #{ownerId}, #{cargoType}, #{petName}, #{petBreed}, #{petAge}, #{petGender}, #{weight}, #{status}, #{originName}, #{originLat}, #{originLng}, #{destinationName}, #{destinationLat}, #{destinationLng}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{requestNote}, now(), now() )
mapper.update: UPDATE cargo SET cargo_type = #{cargoType}, pet_name = #{petName}, pet_breed = #{petBreed}, pet_age = #{petAge}, pet_gender = #{petGender}, weight = #{weight}, status = #{status}, origin_name = #{originName}, origin_lat = #{originLat}, origin_lng = #{originLng}, destination_name = #{destinationName}, destination_lat = #{destinationLat}, destination_lng = #{destinationLng}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, request_note = #{requestNote}, loaded_at = #{loadedAt}, delivered_at = #{deliveredAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE cargo_id = #{cargoId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cargo_vehicle_binding ( id, cargo_id, vehicle_id, status, bound_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{cargoId}, #{vehicleId}, #{status}, now() )
mapper.update: UPDATE cargo SET status = #{status}, loaded_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'LOADED' AND loaded_at IS NULL THEN now() ELSE loaded_at END, delivered_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DELIVERED' AND delivered_at IS NULL THEN now() ELSE delivered_at END, updated_at = now() WHERE cargo_id = #{cargoId}
UPDATE cargo SET destination_name = #{destinationName}, destination_lat = #{destinationLat}, destination_lng = #{destinationLng}, updated_at = now() WHERE cargo_id = #{cargoId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE c.status = 'IN_TRANSIT' AND v.id IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE cargo_vehicle_binding SET status = 'UNBOUND', unbound_at = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
